name: Zero2IPO Holdings Inc.
summary: Zero2IPO Holdings Inc., an investment holding company, provides integrated equity investment services in the People's Republic of China. It operates an integrated service platform that offers data, consulting, marketing, and training services to participants in the equity investment industry. The company provides PEdata Database and research report services that enable convenient and easy-to-navigate access to industry data and informed decision-making. It also offers omni-channel marketing services through its online information platforms, such as PEdaily; and offline industry events, which track industry trends and facilitate intra- and inter-industry networking. In addition, the company connects entrepreneurs and growth enterprises with investors through its online investor-entrepreneur matching platform and offline consulting services. Further, it provides various equity investment-related online and offline training courses through SandHill University, SandHill College, and Investment College. The company provides its services through online and offline channels for participants in the equity investment industry, including investors, entrepreneurs, growth enterprises, and government agencies. Zero2IPO Holdings Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
